name: Breaking Bear
overview: The escapades of three bear siblings who decide they have to start selling drugs in order to raise money and save their home after gas companies start fracking next to their cave. The bears soon enlist other forest animals in a scheme that will pit them against oil companies, The Russian Mafia, local Hell’s Angels and polar bears who hate anything that isn’t white.

trailers.title: Sarah Michelle Gellar, Brendan Fraser, Elizabeth Hurley and Annie Murphy Talk Breaking Bear
